Fact_CO012_Actuals.inline_source:
SELECT
  fiscper,
  comp_code,
  bic_chversion,
  SUM(volume_in_uc) AS volume_in_uc
FROM dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_datamart_fm.co012_profitability_gross_profit_analysis_actuals
WHERE fiscper >= CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) - 2 AS STRING), '001')
  AND bic_chversion = '0000'
GROUP BY
  fiscper,
  comp_code,
  bic_chversion

Fact_HR_A.name: dim_company
Fact_HR_A.source:
SELECT
  market_segment,
  business_unit,
  business_unit_abbreviation,
  country,
  country_abbreviation,
  geo_country,
  country_id,
  CAST(co_code_bw AS STRING) as co_code_bw,
  country_sequence_id,
  business_unit_sequence_id,
  process_run_id,
  comp_code
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    market_segment,
    business_unit,
    business_unit_abbreviation,
    country,
    country_abbreviation,
    geo_country,
    country_id,
    co_code_bw,
    country_sequence_id,
    business_unit_sequence_id,
    process_run_id,
    CASE
      WHEN LENGTH(CAST(co_code_bw AS STRING)) = 3
      THEN CONCAT('0', CAST(co_code_bw AS STRING))
      ELSE CAST(co_code_bw AS STRING)
    END as comp_code
  FROM dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_cchbc_md.ca_dim_company
  WHERE co_code_bw IS NOT NULL
) base_data QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY comp_code ORDER BY comp_code) = 1

Fact_HR_A.name: dim_region
Fact_HR_A.source:
SELECT
  region,
  region_sequence_id,
  CAST(co_code_bw AS STRING) as co_code_bw,
  comp_code
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    region,
    region_sequence_id,
    co_code_bw,
    CASE
      WHEN LENGTH(CAST(co_code_bw AS STRING)) = 3
      THEN CONCAT('0', CAST(co_code_bw AS STRING))
      ELSE CAST(co_code_bw AS STRING)
    END as comp_code
  FROM dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_cchbc_md.ca_dim_company
  WHERE co_code_bw IS NOT NULL
) base_data
WHERE region NOT IN ('Africa', 'CCH 27', 'CCH 28', 'CCH P&C All', 'Europe', 'Europe excl. BU Russia', 'Total CCH Territories', 'CCH 29 Trading Update') AND region IS NOT NULL
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY comp_code ORDER BY comp_code) = 1

fact_scorecard_BP_wc.name: total_sle_bp
fact_scorecard_BP_wc.raw_expr: SUM(source.fltp) FILTER (WHERE source.bic_csubkbi IN ('KPE00213', 'KPE00261') AND dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('APET','CAN','HDPE FG','JUICE-BRICK','NRGB','PET','PMX','RGB','TNK','CHIPS FG')) / NULLIF(SUM(source.fltp) FILTER (WHERE source.bic_csubkbi IN ('KPE00214', 'KPE00262') AND dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('APET','CAN','HDPE FG','JUICE-BRICK','NRGB','PET','PMX','RGB','TNK','CHIPS FG')), 0)

fact_iom06_detailed.name: ot_actual
fact_iom06_detailed.comment: On-Time delivery: (deliveries - overdue) / deliveries (co_code_bw NOT IN (550, 403) path)

fact_iom06_detailed.name: ai_actual

fact_iom06_detailed.name: ot_actual_test
fact_iom06_detailed.raw_expr: (SUM(source.kbi_value) FILTER (WHERE source.bic_csubkbi = 'KIOM00605' AND source.bic_chversion = '0000') - SUM(source.kbi_value) FILTER (WHERE source.bic_csubkbi = 'KIOM00606' AND source.bic_chversion = '0000')) / NULLIF(SUM(source.kbi_value) FILTER (WHERE source.bic_csubkbi = 'KIOM00605' AND source.bic_chversion = '0000'), 0)
fact_iom06_detailed.comment: OT Actual test: KBI-based formula (KIOM00605/KIOM00606) for geography routing

FT_BPC003.name: cost_supply_per_uc_actual
FT_BPC003.raw_expr: SUM(source.value) FILTER (WHERE source.bic_chversion = '0000' AND source.fis_code_parent IN ('DCD2','DHF2')) / NULLIF(SUM(co012.volume_in_uc), 0)
FT_BPC003.comment: Cost to Supply per Unit Case (Actuals) — SWITCH decomposition

FT_BPC003.name: cost_supply_pct_nsr_actual
FT_BPC003.raw_expr: SUM(source.value) FILTER (WHERE source.bic_chversion = '0000' AND source.fis_code_parent IN ('DCD2','DHF2')) / NULLIF(SUM(co012.net_sales_revenue), 0)
FT_BPC003.comment: Cost to Supply % NSR (Actuals) — SWITCH decomposition

FT_BPC003.name: prod_oh_per_uc_actual
FT_BPC003.raw_expr: SUM(source.value) FILTER (WHERE source.bic_chversion = '0000' AND source.fis_code IN ('DCC3','DCC1','DCCE','DCCN','DCCY','DCEJ','DCEZ','DCEK')) / NULLIF(SUM(co012.volume_in_uc), 0)
FT_BPC003.comment: Production Overhead per Unit Case (Actuals) — SWITCH decomposition

FT_BPC003.name: prod_oh_pct_nsr_actual
FT_BPC003.raw_expr: SUM(source.value) FILTER (WHERE source.bic_chversion = '0000' AND source.fis_code IN ('DCC3','DCC1','DCCE','DCCN','DCCY','DCEJ','DCEZ','DCEK')) / NULLIF(SUM(co012.net_sales_revenue), 0)

FT_BPC003.name: sc_cost_per_uc_actual
FT_BPC003.raw_expr: SUM(source.value) FILTER (WHERE source.bic_chversion = '0000' AND source.fis_code IN ('DCC3','DCC1','DCCE','DCCN','DCCY','DCEJ','DCEZ','DCEK','DCD2','DHG2','DHH2')) / NULLIF(SUM(co012.volume_in_uc), 0)
FT_BPC003.comment: Supply Chain Cost per Unit Case (Actuals) — SWITCH decomposition

FT_BPC003.name: sc_cost_pct_nsr_actual
FT_BPC003.raw_expr: SUM(source.value) FILTER (WHERE source.bic_chversion = '0000' AND source.fis_code IN ('DCC3','DCC1','DCCE','DCCN','DCCY','DCEJ','DCEZ','DCEK','DCD2','DHG2','DHH2')) / NULLIF(SUM(co012.net_sales_revenue), 0)
FT_BPC003.comment: Supply Chain Cost % NSR (Actuals) — SWITCH decomposition

Fact_CO012_REBP.name: sc_prod_actual_bp
Fact_CO012_REBP.raw_expr: SUM(source.volume_in_uc) FILTER (WHERE source.bic_chversion = 'B000') / NULLIF(SUM(hr_a.khr004001_fte_total) FILTER (WHERE hr_a.bic_chversion = 'B000' AND hr_a.func_area IN ('Z320', 'Z110', 'Z120', 'Z310')) / NULLIF(1, 0), 0)
Fact_CO012_REBP.comment: SC Productivity BP: volume_in_uc / FTE (cross-table via hr_a)

AVG_KBI_Div_Factor.comment: PBI time-period divisor (MTD=1). Hardcoded to 1; BI layer handles period averaging.

khr004001_fte_total.comment: Total full-time equivalent headcount across all versions and functional areas

khr004011_number_of_voluntary_permanent_.comment: Number of permanent employees who left voluntarily (resignations)

khr004012_number_of_involuntary_permanen.comment: Number of permanent employees who left involuntarily (terminations)

khr004013_actual_number_of_permanent_emp.comment: Actual number of permanent employees on the books

sc_people_cost.comment: Supply chain people cost — actuals in group currency for SC functional areas (Z320, Z110, Z120, Z310)

sc_overtime_cost.comment: Supply chain overtime cost — actuals in group currency for SC functional areas

sc_fte.comment: Supply chain full-time equivalents — actuals for SC functional areas

sc_turnover.comment: Supply chain employee turnover rate — (voluntary + involuntary leavers) / permanent employees for SC functional areas

sc_prod_actual.comment: Supply chain productivity — volume in unit cases per SC FTE (actuals)

sc_fte_bp.comment: Supply chain full-time equivalents — budget plan for SC functional areas

sc_overtime_cost_bp.comment: Supply chain overtime cost — budget plan in group currency for SC functional areas

sc_people_cost_bp.comment: Supply chain people cost — budget plan in group currency for SC functional areas

sc_turnover_bp.comment: Supply chain employee turnover rate — budget plan for SC functional areas

comment_overrides.Fact_HR_A:
Supply chain HR cross-functional metrics for workforce planning and performance analysis.
Provides actuals, budget, and rolling estimate views of key people KPIs including
FTE headcount, employee turnover (voluntary and involuntary), vacant positions,
people cost, and overtime cost — focused on supply chain functional areas.
Used to track workforce efficiency, attrition trends, and labor cost management
across company codes, cost centers, and departments.


Technical details:
Source: hr004_cross_functional_v1 (UNION: main data with RE version mapping + actuals-as-RE for completed periods).
RE_Version PBI parameter dynamized: MONTH >= 10 → R100, >= 7 → R070, >= 4 → R040, else no RE.
Fiscal period filter: fiscper >= 2 years ago. Version filter: bic_chversion <> R090.
M transformations: COALESCE nulls (func_area, bic_chrsegmnt → '000000'), Dept_KEY from SUBSTRING(bic_ca_mcctr, 4, 3).

comp_code.comment: Company code identifying the legal entity within the group

bic_chrsegmnt.comment: Human resources segment classification (nulls replaced with 000000)

bic_chversion1.comment: Original version code before RE mapping was applied

dept_key.comment: Department key derived from SUBSTRING(bic_ca_mcctr, 4, 3) cast to integer

corporate_cost_level_01.comment: Top-level corporate cost classification from department dimension

corporate_cost_level_02.comment: Mid-level corporate cost classification from department dimension

corporate_cost_level_03.comment: Detailed corporate cost classification from department dimension

business_unit.comment: Business unit name from the company dimension (e.g., region or operating unit)

geo_country.comment: Geographic country name from the company dimension

region.comment: Geographic region, excluding aggregate regions (Africa, CCH 27, CCH 28, CCH P&C All, Europe, Europe excl. BU Russia)

fiscal_month.comment: Fiscal month (3-digit period within the fiscal year)

fiscal_year.comment: Fiscal year from the calendar dimension
